guests_arriving.label: Guests Coming
guests_arriving.prompt: Guests are coming in 30 minutes. Need snacks and drinks for 6 people under ₹500.
safety_notes: Check allergen info if guests have known dietary restrictions.
Disposables reduce cleanup time and are often forgotten.
Sweet snacks add perceived completeness to guest hospitality.

rescue_rules.rescue_message: Could not fill all guest categories within budget. Snacks and drinks prioritized.

breakfast_rush.label: Breakfast Rush
breakfast_rush.prompt: Kids need breakfast before school in 20 minutes. Nothing in the kitchen.
safety_notes: Check for nut allergies for children.
Prioritize items that need no cooking for fastest preparation.
Milk and bread form the minimum viable breakfast.

rescue_rules.rescue_message: Minimal breakfast assembled. Consider bread + milk + spreads as base.

child_fever.label: Child Fever Essentials
child_fever.prompt: My child has a fever. Need support essentials urgently.
safety_notes: Non-prescription support essentials only.
Please consult a doctor for medication or emergency symptoms.
ORS is critical for dehydration from fever.
Thermometer is essential for monitoring.

rescue_rules.rescue_message: Minimum fever care support items included. Consult doctor if fever persists beyond 24 hours.

power_cut.label: Power Cut
power_cut.prompt: Sudden power cut at home. Need emergency supplies immediately.
power_cut.forgotten_essential_reason: Emergency backup essential during power cut.
safety_notes: Keep candles away from curtains and flammable objects.
Power bank should be kept charged for emergencies.
Mosquito repellent is critical if no fans are running.
Check inverter battery water level if applicable.

rescue_rules.rescue_message: Basic light sources included. Add mosquito protection if power cut extends to night.

pooja_items.label: Pooja Items
pooja_items.prompt: Pooja starting in 45 minutes. Need all essentials.
safety_notes: Camphor should be kept away from children.
Fresh flowers are preferred but artificial works in emergency.
Cotton wicks and oil are commonly forgotten together.
Ghee can substitute for diya oil in most traditions.

rescue_rules.rescue_message: Core pooja items included. Fresh flowers or coconut may need separate trip.

late_night_hunger.label: Late Night Hunger
late_night_hunger.prompt: It's 11 PM. I'm hungry and everything is closed nearby.
late_night_hunger.forgotten_essential_reason: Useful add-on for late-night snack order.
safety_notes: Prefer items that are easy to prepare or ready to eat.
Hot beverages like chai help with late night satisfaction.
Instant noodles or cup meals are fastest to prepare.

rescue_rules.rescue_message: Basic munchies included. Add a hot drink for comfort.

general_urgent_need.label: General Urgent Need
general_urgent_need.prompt: I need some useful items quickly.
safety_notes: General household items selected based on availability.
